name: Within Constraint Scope
description: Every action must fall within the active ConstraintSet binding the execution (limits, permissions, risk envelope).
rationale: FIX Intent & Constraint. An action outside the certified constraint scope is a Red hard failure; the ConstraintSet enables post-trade verification that execution was within declared scope.

examples.fails: order sized outside the active ConstraintSet limits

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
